title: DUNQOL
description: Duncan's Quality of Life pack specifically made for Hardcore Survival
body:
![DUNQOL header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/686fe2d2afc601c151022cc7965df840fbd4326f.png)

# Duncan's Quality of Life
This pack focusses on bringing the best and easiest Minecraft experience while also maintaining the vanilla experience. I made this pack specifically for my Hardcore Survival singleplayer series. It has some mods that make your life a little easier without crossing the line of "cheating".

It also provides a few Content Creator friendly mods such as Flashback and Camera Utils.
Not every mod that i wanted is updated to 1.21.1 so if anything could be added please let me know through my Discord!

![DunQOL divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131bc84d0aaf3ef35db95118c6359cd0da1cfa09.png)

### HOW TO INSTALL:
1. Download the Modrinth app
2. Search for DUNQOL and click install
3. Run the instance, check your settings / keybinds and have fun!

Recommended to use at least 8GB of RAM if you're planning to run Flashback

**IMPORTANT:** To render in Flashback you need to disable Essential due to an incompatibility. If you're not using anything from the Essential mod you could disable it entirely yourself.

![DunQOL divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131bc84d0aaf3ef35db95118c6359cd0da1cfa09.png)


**Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/pZebhUmnQp)**

For any **questions** please contact me through [x/Twitter or Instagram](https://linktr.ee/DuncanMassink)
